verdict.answer_first: A gets to the recommendation faster: “Recommended default: Server-Sent Events (SSE) for in-app, Web Push for background”; B opens with a caveat about “no web app in this directory.”
verdict.decisiveness: A commits more cleanly: “SSE is the right default”; B spends more space surveying “SSE,” “WebSocket,” “Web Push,” and “Email or SMS.”
verdict.fabrication: B invents context and an unsupported number: “there's no web app in this directory” and “covers ~90%”; A: none.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it gives architecture, minimum data model, and phased steps: “Persistence + REST,” “SSE live layer,” “Web Push,” “Polish.”
